title: Machine Coding Interview
subtitle: 90-minute build, debugging drills, code review, and 20 interview questions — no new theory
prerequisites: week1 — components, props, useState, forms, routing fundamentals
week2 — APIs, custom hooks, Context, dynamic routes, machine coding Round 2
week3 — Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, authentication, performance, dashboards
day21 — machine coding Round 3: auth, dashboard, Redux, API, theme without references
expectedOutcome: Complete a frontend machine coding round independently within 90 minutes
Fix common React bugs: infinite render, mutation, deps, keys, API, routing
Conduct a structured self code review on folder structure, naming, a11y, reusability
Answer 20 interview questions across JavaScript, React, TypeScript, architecture, and performance
Explain architectural trade-offs under interviewer pressure
definitionOfDone: Kanban Board machine coding challenge completed within 90-minute time box
All six debugging scenarios diagnosed and fixed in the provided buggy code
Self code review completed with written notes on structure, performance, and accessibility
20 interview questions answered out loud or in writing
Reflection submitted with honest weak-area assessment

tomorrowPreview.title: Production Ready Frontend
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will refactor a previous project for production — folder structure, hooks, performance, accessibility, and senior-level architecture explanations.
